description_long: This is a compact, dark wood filing cabinet with a rectangular top and sturdy, slightly flared base. The front features a single, flat-faced drawer with a small, round metallic knob for easy access. The sides and back are plain, with a subtle wood grain texture visible throughout the surface. The cabinet's design is simple and functional, with no visible label holders or locking mechanisms. Its solid construction suggests it is intended for indoor use, likely in an office or home setting. The top surface is flat and can support additional objects such as office supplies or small electronics.
description: A dark wood filing cabinet with a single drawer and a round metallic knob, featuring a flat top and sturdy base.
description_view_0: The back of the cabinet, showing a plain, flat wood surface with no handles or features.
description_view_1: The front of the cabinet, displaying a single drawer with a round metallic knob and a flat top surface.
description_view_2: The left side of the cabinet, plain with a slight glimpse of the knob from the front drawer.
description_view_3: The right side of the cabinet, plain and featureless, showing the wood grain texture.
